name: wordpress-content-monitor
description: Read public WordPress REST posts and normalize content-monitoring rows for sales and marketing intelligence.
business_value: No-key competitor blog, changelog, and content-campaign monitoring.

auth.note: Uses public WordPress REST posts when enabled by the site.

verification_result: Live smoke checked wordpress.org/news REST posts and received post rows without an API key.
known_risks: Not all WordPress sites expose REST posts.
Terms and robots policies still apply.
HTML content should be sanitized before reuse.
